developers.title: Developers
developers.subtitle: Manage followed GitHub developers, view and sync starred projects
developers.noDevsHint: Use the search box above to add GitHub developers
developers.syncingHint: Sync may take several minutes, please keep the page open
developers.personalityDesc: Developer profile based on language distribution of starred repos
developers.loadError: Failed to load developers, loaded local demo data
developers.syncUnknownError: Sync failed. Please check GitHub rate limit, username, or network status.
developers.simulateNotice: Simulating 401/404/rate-limit/network-fail states, not calling GitHub API.

starExplorer.title: Star Explorer
starExplorer.desc: Global analysis of developer starred repos: profiling, filtering, sorting, classification, and risk identification.
starExplorer.licenseRiskDetail: GPL or unknown license needs review
starExplorer.topicClustersDesc: Organize starred repos from a flat list into an interest map
starExplorer.classificationCovDesc: Topic, repo name, and description classification strategies
starExplorer.timelineDesc: Developer focus changes aggregated by starred_at
starExplorer.licenseDistDesc: Engineering reminder only, not legal advice
starExplorer.exportConsistencyDesc: Export content matches current filter results
starExplorer.removedStarSignalsDesc: Incremental sync does not directly delete unstarred records
starExplorer.allReposDesc: Browse, filter, and sort all starred repos for the current developer.
starExplorer.searchPlaceholder: Search repos, descriptions, topics, or auto tags...
starExplorer.noResultsHint: Adjust keywords, language, topic, or license filters and try again.
starExplorer.exportConsistentHint: Export format: {{format}}, content matches current filter results.
starExplorer.loadingHint: First sync may take a while, please be patient.
starExplorer.fallbackNotice: Showing demo data. Real API connection failed.
starExplorer.syncedNotice: Data synced. Will auto-degrade if GitHub API rate-limited or network fails.
starExplorer.apiUnavailable: API unavailable, fallback to demo data.
starExplorer.networkError: Network error, fallback to demo data.
starExplorer.prepareExport: Prepared to export current filter results as {{format}}.
starExplorer.htmlNotSupported: HTML export not supported. Please choose CSV, JSON, or Markdown.
starExplorer.exportFailedNoData: Export failed: server returned no data.
starExplorer.selectedRepo: Selected {{repo}}. Go to 'Repository Analysis' for deep analysis.
starExplorer.classificationSourceTopicDetail: Strong match, primary source for auto-tags
starExplorer.classificationSourceNameDetail: Identifies explicit keywords like MCP, RAG, CLI
starExplorer.classificationSourceDescDetail: Supplements semantics when topics are missing
starExplorer.removedSignalUnstarDetail: Not returned in this sync, but not deleted
starExplorer.removedStarsDesc: {{count}} repositories removed from your starred list
starExplorer.licenseRiskDesc: {{count}} repositories use GPL or unknown licenses, which may restrict commercial use
starExplorer.licenseRiskExplain: GPL requires derivative works to be open source; unknown licenses have unclear terms.

repoAnalysis.rawDataHint: Click a repo card to view raw GitHub data
repoAnalysis.title: Repository Analysis
repoAnalysis.desc: Static analysis workspace for individual starred repos: README summary, tech stack, maintenance signals, license risk, learning value, and similar repo recommendations.
repoAnalysis.searchPlaceholder: Search or select a repository for analysis
repoAnalysis.readmeSummaryDesc: Project understanding card generated from README and description
repoAnalysis.techStackDesc: Basic dimensions for learning paths and reuse recommendations
repoAnalysis.activityAnalysisDesc: Static scores for presenting future analysis results
repoAnalysis.licenseRiskDesc: Engineering reminder only, not legal advice
repoAnalysis.similarReposDesc: For comparison, alternatives, and learning path generation
repoAnalysis.apiUnavailable: API unavailable, fallback to Demo data.
repoAnalysis.noApiData: No API data, showing Demo data.

tagCloud.title: Tag Cloud
tagCloud.desc: Rule-based tags from Topic exact match + repo name/description fuzzy match. Larger font = more matched repos.
tagCloud.noDataFallback: No tag data in demo mode. Please connect to the backend API and trigger classification.
tagCloud.noData: No tag data yet. Please click 'Update Star Analysis' to trigger rule classification.

repoDetail.fallbackNotice: API data unavailable. Showing demo data.
repoDetail.apiUnavailable: API temporarily unavailable, showing demo data
repoDetail.fetchError: Failed to fetch data, showing demo data
repoDetail.licenseFreeDesc: Free for commercial use, modification and distribution

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: App configuration, backend connection status, and data source management
settings.aiHint: Configure API Key and Base URL to enable translation and analysis
settings.githubTokenDesc: Personal Access Token for syncing more repositories
settings.tokenHint: Create at GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens, scope: public_repo
